explicit_text: I was born and raised in the province of Cebu in the Philippines, specifically in Guanbacil. Growing up there with my parents, my life was simple and ordinary. Cebu holds a special place in my heart because it is where my roots are and where my family still lives.

explicit_text: The Philippines is my homeland where I grew up and where my family still resides. It was in the Philippines that I met my future husband through Yahoo! Chat, and he visited me there in September 2006. Before moving to the United States in 2008, I traveled around the Philippines with my parents, including a memorable trip on the SuperFerry to the capital for my visa interview and medical exams.

explicit_text: I came to the United States on July 19, 2008, to be with my husband and to seek a better future. After arriving, we got married soon after, and I eventually became a U.S. citizen. Living here has allowed me to have a stable job as a certified manager and support my family, which I am very thankful for.
